summary: Raw vertical handheld footage of a single ICE arrest: an agent in a tactical vest handcuffs a man in a teal shirt and paint-stained jeans beside a vehicle at golden hour, the detainee's face blurred. There are no stylized cuts, graphics, genre styling, or montage editing, and the music_score is very low (0.33); it is one continuous documentary-style arrest clip, not a produced spectacle. The self-deport stipend pitch lives only in the tweet text, so the video itself is out of scope.
notable_text: (tweet only) it's time to self-deport; Skip the ICE arrest; Get a free flight home; Receive a $1,000 stipend
